# Irregular boundary under the abstract-grid stamp phase.
# Without suppression passes, slivers and tiny faces near the
# non-rectangular edges are expected. This golden just anchors the
# current output; P5 (suppression) will change it.

polygon outer
-48.47,0
750,0
782.80,654.85
0,654.85
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

debug use_abstract_stamp=true
----
debug use_abstract_stamp=true

generate
----
